test.name: Verificar se ao preencher os campos do formulário corretamente os dados são inseridos na lista e se um novo card é criado no time esperado

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Image Url
kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clique no botão criar card
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então identificar o card dentro do time esperado
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Verificar se é possível criar mais de um card no time esperado ao preenchermos os campos corretamente

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Image Url
kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clique no botão criar card
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então identificar 3 cards dentro do time esperado
Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Engenheiro de som' into text field 'id:form-cargo'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Image Url
kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clique no botão criar card
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Image Url
kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clique no botão criar card
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Verificar se é possível criar um card para cada time disponível ao preenchermos os campos corretamente

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Maria Julia' into text field 'id:form-nome'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Image Url
kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então criar e identificar 1 card em cada time disponível
Dado que preencha os campos do formulário
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Guardador de veículos' into text field 'id:form-cargo'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns URL to placeholder image Example: http://placehold.it/640x480

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: E clique no botão criar card
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
